memoryArtifacts.headline: Roger Fritz Reinfred b. 1114-d.1198
memoryArtifacts.description: Died after 1198 at Whiteby Abbey after a timber fell on his head. He was a steward to King Henry II. Soldier, monk of Eversham at Whiteby Abbey given by William Percy

memoryArtifacts.headline: My Maternal 24th. Great Grandmother, Alice Foliot
memoryArtifacts.description:
Name: Alice Foliot, daughter of Robert Foliot and Margaret de Reinbudcourt
Born: 1140 in  Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, England
Married: about 1156 in England to Roger Fitz Reinfrid
Children: (3) …

zh.Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, Engla: 英國諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登
zh.Kendal Castle, Westmoreland, England: 英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德肯達爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger FitzReinfrid於大約1144年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德肯達爾時，他的父親Ralph De Bruere31歲，母親Muriella de Bohun26歲。他於大約1156年與Alice Foliot在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1187年在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, Engla: 英国諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登
zh-hans.Kendal Castle, Westmoreland, England: 英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德肯達爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger FitzReinfrid于大约1144年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德肯達爾时，他的父亲Ralph De Bruere31岁，母亲Muriella de Bohun26岁。他于大约1156年与Alice Foliot在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1187年在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger FitzReinfrid was born about 1144, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph De Bruere, was 31 and his mother, Muriella de Bohun, was 26. He married Alice Foliot about 1156, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1187, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger FitzReinfrid est né environ 1144, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph De Bruere, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Muriella de Bohun, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice Foliot environ 1156, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1187, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger FitzReinfrid um 1144 in Kendal, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph De Bruere 31 und seine Mutter Muriella de Bohun 26. Er hat um 1156 in England Alice Foliot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1187 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger FitzReinfrid è nato il circa 1144 nel Kendal, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph De Bruere, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Muriella de Bohun, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alice Foliot circa 1156, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1187, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.Kendal Castle, Westmoreland, England: イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドケンダル
ja.lifeSummary: Roger FitzReinfridが約1144年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで生まれた時，父Ralph De Bruereは31歳，母Muriella de Bohunは26歳であった。約1156年にイギリスでAlice Foliotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1187年に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger FitzReinfrid(이)가 대략 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph De Bruere(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Muriella de Bohun(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1156년 영국에서 Alice Foliot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1187년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Kendal Castle, Westmoreland, England: Kendal, Westmōringaland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger FitzReinfrid nasceu aproximadamente 1144, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph De Bruere, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Muriella de Bohun, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Foliot aproximadamente 1156, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1187, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger FitzReinfrid родился около 1144 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph De Bruere было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Muriella de Bohun, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Foliot около 1156 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1187 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger FitzReinfrid nació aproximadamente 1144, en Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph De Bruere, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Muriella de Bohun, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alice Foliot aproximadamente 1156, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1187, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
